{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Mantell
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Mantell]] is an attendant who escorts [[Raion]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Mantell]] is an [[arena]] employee.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27">''The Knight'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
